channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Iran Calls Deal "Failure" For US, Says Hormuz Won't Return To "Pre-War" Era

media:content.media:description: Ghalibaf clarified that the Strait of Hormuz will not return to the pre-war conditions.

item.description: Iran's top negotiator, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, however, said that Iran is engaging diplomatically with the US from a "position of strength".
item.content:encoded: Iran's top negotiator, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, however, said that Iran is engaging diplomatically with the US from a "position of strength".

item.title: "Very Wise Man Once Said...": US Reporter Plays Back Trump's 2020 Iran Tweet
item.description: Trump routinely criticises American media for spreading 'fake news' about his administration, referring to reportage critical of the president's handling of the economy and foreign policy.
item.content:encoded: Trump routinely criticises American media for spreading 'fake news' about his administration, referring to reportage critical of the president's handling of the economy and foreign policy.

item.title: "This Was Not Easy": Trump As He Signs Deal To End US-Iran War

media:content.media:description: Iran said it is now "time to test" the implementation of the agreement.

item.description: A video showed Macron - who was seated next to Trump, US Secretary of State Marco Rubio - who was standing behind Trump, and other guests applauding.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1114698/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>A video showed Macron - who was seated next to Trump, US Secretary of State Marco Rubio - who was standing behind Trump, and other guests applauding.

item.title: Nuclear, Hormuz, Sanctions: Challenges In The Way Of US-Iran Deal

media:content.media:description: Iran is deeply suspicious of Trump, who twice in the past year attacked in the middle of negotiations.

item.description: When U.S. and Iranian negotiators sit down in Switzerland on Friday after nearly four months of war, the stakes couldn’t be higher as they face an
item.content:encoded: When U.S. and Iranian negotiators sit down in Switzerland on Friday after nearly four months of war, the stakes couldn’t be higher as they face an

item.title: US-Iran Sign Deal To End War. Read Full Text Of 14-Point Agreement

media:content.media:description: The final US-Iran peace deal will be endorsed by binding UNSC resolution.

item.description: US and Iran have commited to negotiating and achieving the final deal in maximum 60 days extendable with mutual consent.
item.content:encoded: US and Iran have commited to negotiating and achieving the final deal in maximum 60 days extendable with mutual consent.

item.title: US-Iran LIVE Updates: US, Iran Sign Peace Deal, 60-Day Negotiating Clock Starts Ticking

media:content.media:description: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US and Iran signed the deal digitally.

item.description: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Netanyahu pledged that Iran would never be allowed to acquire nuclear weapons, regardless of the terms of any agreement.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Netanyahu pledged that Iran would never be allowed to acquire nuclear weapons, regardless of the terms of any agreement.

item.title: Your iPhone Is About To Get Expensive. Tim Cook Explains Why

media:content.media:description: Apple is reportedly on track to release its first foldable iPhone in September.

item.description: Apple plans to raise prices on its products to offset increasing memory and storage chip costs, CEO Tim Cook told the Wall Street Journal in an interview. A surge in AIdriven
item.content:encoded: Apple plans to raise prices on its products to offset increasing memory and storage chip costs, CEO Tim Cook told the Wall Street Journal in an interview. A surge in AIdriven

item.title: "Nobody Did That On Purpose": Trump On Iran School Strike That Killed 170

media:content.media:description: Trump said the investigation into the strike at the girls' school is underway.

item.description: LESBAINS, France, June 17 (Reuters) U.S. President Donald Trump said on Wednesday that "nobody" purposefully attacked a girls' school in Iran in February, citing an investigation into the
item.content:encoded: LESBAINS, France, June 17 (Reuters) U.S. President Donald Trump said on Wednesday that "nobody" purposefully attacked a girls' school in Iran in February, citing an investigation into the

item.title: US, Iran Sign Peace Deal. Tehran Says "Time To Test The Implementation"

media:content.media:description: The formal signing had originally been planned to take place in Switzerland on Friday.

item.description: Trump Has Signed Iran Peace Deal To End Middle East War: US Official

item.title: Iran To "Instantly" Reopen Hormuz, US To "Immediately" Lift Blockade: Pak PM
item.description: Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif said on Thursday said that Tehran will reopen the Strait of Hormuz "instantly" after the US and Iran have signed the peace deal.
item.content:encoded: Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif said on Thursday said that Tehran will reopen the Strait of Hormuz "instantly" after the US and Iran have signed the peace deal.

item.title: "Not Our Money": Trump Defends Release Of Iran's Frozen Assets

media:content.media:description: US President Donald Trump has defended the return of frozen Iranian assets.

item.description: Speaking to reporters on the sidelines of the G7 Summit in France, Trump said that while the United States had frozen significant Iranian assets.
item.content:encoded: Speaking to reporters on the sidelines of the G7 Summit in France, Trump said that while the United States had frozen significant Iranian assets.

item.title: Hormuz Won't Return To Pre-War Conditions, Will Impose Fees After 60 Days: Iran

media:content.media:description: Iran said it has the "right to sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz".

item.description: Iran's chief negotiator on Wednesday repeated Tehran would charge ships crossing the Strait of Hormuz after a 60-day fee-free period stipulated in a memorandum of understanding with the US.
item.content:encoded: Iran's chief negotiator on Wednesday repeated Tehran would charge ships crossing the Strait of Hormuz after a 60-day fee-free period stipulated in a memorandum of understanding with the US.

item.title: Trump Asks Netanyahu To Take "Softer Touch" In Dealing with Hezbollah
item.description: US President Donald Trump on Wednesday asked Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to take a "softer touch" in dealing with Hezbollah targets in Lebanon.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump on Wednesday asked Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to take a "softer touch" in dealing with Hezbollah targets in Lebanon.

item.title: Other Countries Have Ballistic Missiles, Unfair If Iran Does Not: Trump

media:content.media:description: Trump said that it's a little bit unfair for Iran if it does not have ballistic missiles.

item.description: US President Donald Trump said on Wednesday that it would be unfair for Iran not to have ballistic missiles if other countries have them.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said on Wednesday that it would be unfair for Iran not to have ballistic missiles if other countries have them.

item.title: Lula Says Trump "Should Not Meddle" In Brazil's Elections

media:content.media:description: Lula said Trump could "learn from Brazil's civilized elections."

item.description: Lula and Trump have had an up-and-down relationship, which has soured again recently over new tariff threats. The pair did not hold an official meeting at the G7.
item.content:encoded: Lula and Trump have had an up-and-down relationship, which has soured again recently over new tariff threats. The pair did not hold an official meeting at the G7.

item.title: Open Hormuz, $300-Billion Fund, No Nukes: US Officials Release Iran Deal Text

media:content.media:description: Iran has so far not released any details of its own.

item.description: Hormuz reopening, $300-billion reconstruction fund, no nuclear weapons: US officials release text of Iran deal
item.content:encoded: Hormuz reopening, $300-billion reconstruction fund, no nuclear weapons: US officials release text of Iran deal

item.title: US Man Cleared Of False Child Abuse Allegations In Bogota After Video Sparked Outrage
item.description: Colombian President Gustavo Petro said that the man "apparently did not" abuse any children.
item.content:encoded: Colombian President Gustavo Petro said that the man "apparently did not" abuse any children.

item.title: Somalian Pirates Step Up Attacks As Ships Reroute Amid Middle East War

media:content.media:description: Somalia does have a functioning government that allows pirate groups to thrive.

item.description: As commercial passenger flights begin from Noida International Airport (Jewar) from tomorrow, India's aviation sector will add another operational airport to its growing network.
item.content:encoded: As commercial passenger flights begin from Noida International Airport (Jewar) from tomorrow, India's aviation sector will add another operational airport to its growing network.

item.title: "Tomorrow, Maybe Next Day": Trump Injects Uncertainty Into Iran Deal Signing

media:content.media:description: He confirmed that a copy had been shared with Israel.

item.description: The document, titled the "Islamabad Memorandum of Understanding between the United States of America and the Islamic Republic of Iran," was eventually released by Washington on Wednesday.
item.content:encoded: The document, titled the "Islamabad Memorandum of Understanding between the United States of America and the Islamic Republic of Iran," was eventually released by Washington on Wednesday.

item.title: Why India Has A Seat At The G7 Table Without Being A Member

media:content.media:description: India's economic rise has made it impossible for global powers to ignore it

item.description: India is not a formal member of the G7, which includes the US, UK, Canada, France, Germany, Italy and Japan. Yet, it is regularly invited as a special guest, showing how much importance the group now gives to New Delhi's voice.
item.content:encoded: India is not a formal member of the G7, which includes the US, UK, Canada, France, Germany, Italy and Japan. Yet, it is regularly invited as a special guest, showing how much importance the group now gives to New Delhi's voice.
